decisionSource: explicit human candidate-ID authorization in the Gate E2 task prompt

rationale.approved: The eight named candidates encode required mutating tools, intent-entity argument mappings, independently verified selected-state postconditions, and verified outcomes without exhaustive tool-path constraints.
rationale.rejected: They encode exact observed scripted path alternatives; leave-one-out analysis narrowed those paths; they may encode driver style rather than necessary semantics; approving them would risk rejecting valid alternate trajectories.

scopeOfApproval: Blocking Gate E2 stage and branch-creation contract assertions only. Rejected candidates remain advisory evidence and are not approved, blocking, or compilable.
